title: lotus albarracinensis
intro: Lotus albarracinensis is a rare, aquatic plant species belonging to the Nelumbo genus, native to Spain. Its rhizomes and flowers are traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, and has been used to treat skin conditions and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lotus albarracinensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
